01 Executive Summary

Canada–Brazil trade grew 16.0% in 2024–2025, driven primarily by Ontario (68.8% of growth) and a 212% surge in Cocoa products.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: CANADA-BRAZIL TRADE ANALYSIS (2024-2025)
================================================================================

1. TRADE PERFORMANCE OVERVIEW
• Total trade changed by 16.0% ($1,993,594,613)
• Trade balance shifted by $-713,053,291
• SIGNIFICANT CHANGE: Trade volume changed by more than 10% between 2024 and 2025, indicating a major shift in bilateral trade relations.
• 9 provinces showed growth, 3 showed decline

2. TOP PERFORMERS
• Fastest growing province: Ontario (23.4%)
• Top growing product: Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations (212.2%)
• Key growth driver: Ontario (contributed 68.8% of total growth)

3. MARKET SHARE HIGHLIGHTS
• Largest market share (2025): Ontario (49.9%)
• Most improved market share: Ontario (+3.0 pp)
• Top 3 provinces control 92.4% of market

4. 6-MONTH OUTLOOK
• Expected growth rate: 2.2%
• Projected total trade: $7,641,817,188
• Year-over-year projection: 2.2% change
• Confidence level: HIGH (R² = 0.960, MAPE = 2.5%)
• ✓ Model shows strong predictive power - forecast is highly reliable

5. STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Focus on Ontario as the primary growth region
• Prioritize Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations category for expansion
• Monitor Saskatchewan for emerging opportunities
• Prepare for 2.2% trade volume increase over next 6 months

02 Trade Value & Balance

Total trade increased from $12,476,738,128 to $14,470,332,741. The trade balance deficit widened by $-713,053,291.

Figure 1: Total Trade Value (2024–2025)
Category Year Total Trade ($) Exports ($) Imports ($) Trade Balance ($)
0 2024 $12,476,738,128 $2,247,741,912 $10,228,996,216 $-7,981,254,304
1 2025 $14,470,332,741 $2,888,012,573 $11,582,320,168 $-8,694,307,595
Assessment: SIGNIFICANT CHANGE — Trade volume changed by more than 10% between 2024 and 2025, indicating a major shift in bilateral trade relations.

Model Selection: Prophet selected over Linear Regression (R²=0.426) and Holt-Winters (R²=0.009). The high R² and low MAPE indicate strong predictive power.

08 Methodology

Data Sources

  • Statistics Canada - International Trade Database
  • Brazilian Ministry of Economy - Comex Stat
  • World Integrated Trade Solution (WITS)

Analytical Methods

  • Growth Rate: ((2025 – 2024) / 2024) × 100
  • Market Share: (Provincial Value / Total) × 100
  • Contribution: (Provincial Change / Total Change) × 100
  • Forecast: Prophet time series with linear growth (selected over Linear Regression and Holt-Winters)

Technical Notes

  • All values in Canadian Dollars (CAD), nominal terms
  • Merchandise trade only (services excluded)
  • HS Chapter classification based on Harmonized System 2022
  • Analysis period: 2024 – 2025
  • Generated: March 19, 2026
  • Report ID: CAN-BRA-20260319_172907
Report prepared by Cristiane Giacomazzi, Flavia Batista, Julio Carneiro
